violations.text: The freezer was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were held at 49 degrees all food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back entry, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
